data.title: Asian aviation stocks plunge as Iran conflict forces airlines to cancel flights over Middle Eastern airspace
data.description: Shares in Singapore Airlines are down by 4.5%, while Qantas and Japan Airlines are down by 5.4% and 5.6% respectively.

data.title: West Asia war to weigh heavily on China, Europe and India, economists say
